## My research

```{dot}
graph G {
  layout=neato;
  subgraph main {
    node [fixedsize=true, width=0.7, height=0.4];
    SBI -- SMC;
    SMC -- Privacy;
    Privacy -- SBI;
  }
  
}
```

## My research

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="60%"}

::: {.nonincremental}

**Statistics**

- Bayesian modelling[^1] [^2]
- Efficient computation[^3] [^4] [^5]
- Approximate models^3^ ^4^

:::

:::

::: {.column width="40%"}

```{dot}
graph G {
  layout=neato;
  subgraph main {
    node [fixedsize=true, width=0.7, height=0.4];
    SBI -- SMC;
  }
  
}
```

:::

::::

[^1]: @oflaherty2021teen _Demography_
[^2]: @bon2019polling _JRSS A_
[^3]: @bon2021dasmc _Stat & Comp_
[^4]: @bon2025cal _JMLR_
[^5]: @bon2025rbsmc _arXiv_

## My research

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="60%"}

::: {.nonincremental}

**Privacy**

- Federated & transfer learning[^6] [^7]
- Private (Bayesian) computation[^8]
- Approximate models[^9]

:::

:::

::: {.column width="40%"}

```{dot}
graph G {
  layout=neato;
  subgraph main {
    node [fixedsize=true, width=0.7, height=0.4];
    Privacy -- SMC;
    Privacy -- SBI;
  }
  
}
```

:::

::::

[^6]: @hassan2024federated _arXiv_
[^7]: @bretherton2026principled _Bayesian Analysis_
[^8]: @bon2026priv _arXiv_
[^9]: @bon2020acld _J Official Statistics_

## My research

```{dot}
graph G {
  layout=neato;
  subgraph main {
    node [fixedsize=true, width=0.7, height=0.4];
    SBI;
    SMC;
    Privacy;
    SBI -- SMC;
    SMC -- Privacy;
    Privacy -- SBI;
  }
  
}
```

## Today's talk

```{dot}
graph G {
  layout=neato;
  subgraph main {
    node [fixedsize=true, width=0.7, height=0.4];
    SBI;
    SMC;
    Privacy [color="red"];
    SBI -- SMC;
    SMC -- Privacy;
    Privacy -- SBI;
  }
  
}
```
